title: Undo Edits in Text Columns
excerpt: Suppose I click the wrong Item and delete the text in the Long Text column in error. An undo arrow would be helpful for those uh oh moments.

posts.author: artisanjag (John Grasso)
posts.cookedHtml: Suppose I click the wrong Item and delete the text in the Long Text column in error. An undo arrow would be helpful for those uh oh moments.
